requirement.title: Behavioral Assertion Display
requirement.description: Dashboard assertion breakdown renders behavioral assertions with type-specific indicators and match/no-match status.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Behavioral assertions show operator type (tool_called, tool_before, etc.) as a label distinct from text assertions. REQ-F011
Behavioral assertions show match status (matched action index or "not found"). REQ-F011
Text assertions continue to display as before (no visual regression). REQ-N002

requirement.title: Action Log Timeline
requirement.description: Dashboard transcript modal includes an action log tab showing tool calls as a structured timeline.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Transcript modal has an "Action Log" tab alongside existing transcript view. REQ-F012
Action log shows each tool call with: index, tool name, args summary. REQ-F012
Trials without actions field (old results) show "No action log" message. REQ-N002

requirement.title: Scenario Detail Extension
requirement.description: Dashboard scenario detail view shows Plugin Dir and Max Turns fields.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: When scenario has pluginDir, it is shown in scenario detail. REQ-F013
When scenario has maxTurns, it is shown in scenario detail. REQ-F013
Scenarios without these fields show no extra information (no "undefined"). REQ-N002

requirement.title: Turns Used Display
requirement.description: Dashboard trial results show turns used vs max turns.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Trial results table shows turnsUsed column (counted from actions array). REQ-F014
When maxTurns is set, display shows "N / M turns" format. REQ-F014
Trials without actions field show "-" in turnsUsed column. REQ-N002

requirement.title: Mixed Grading Display
requirement.description: Dashboard shows code and model scores separately for mixed-graded trials.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: For mixed-graded trials, assertion breakdown groups behavioral and text assertions visually. REQ-F015
Combined score is shown alongside the per-group breakdown. REQ-F015
